title: fix: pacing ring thresholds at 75% and 90% per Occupational Therapy professional feedback
description: Updates pacing budget ring thresholds to warn at 75% (yellow) and 90% (orange) before the 100% limit. Implements professional Envelope of Function model per Occupational Therapy advisor review.
author: connor.walsh

title: fix: NRS slider endpoint labels - 0=no pain, 10=worst imaginable pain
description: Adds labeled endpoints to the 0-10 numeric rating scale slider per professional standard language. Resolves issue #20.
author: amy.chen

title: fix: participant-centered alert copy - replace 'exceeded limit' with softer phrasing
description: Updates all overdoing alert copy from punitive 'exceeded' language to participant-centered framing. Resolves professional feedback from Occupational Therapy advisors.
author: amy.chen

title: feat: 30-day graph toggle for symptom trend view
description: Adds a 7d/30d toggle to the symptom trend graph component. Supports monthly trend analysis for chronic pain group Occupational Therapy and trainer workloads.
author: willa.schultz

title: feat: Goals of Care field in participant summary for Occupational Therapy documentation
description: Adds 'Goals of Care' and 'Functional Outcomes' fields to the participant summary in the Occupational Therapy community partner portal. Required for insurance billing narrative.
author: amy.chen

title: feat: time-of-day context for daily check-in prompt
description: Check-in prompt now shows 'Good morning' / 'Good afternoon' context and adjusts framing based on time of day. Professional rationale: AM/PM symptom patterns differ in chronic pain group.
author: willa.schultz

title: fix: swap onboarding steps 4 and 5 - activity baseline before topic
description: Reorders onboarding wizard steps per professional Occupational Therapy feedback. Activity baseline collected before topic question to avoid anchoring bias.
author: willa.schultz

title: fix: WCAG 1.4.1 - add warning icon to professional alert banner
description: Adds warning triangle icon to critical and warning alert variants. Fixes color-alone WCAG 1.4.1 violation flagged by Occupational Therapy advisor accessibility review.
author: amy.chen

title: feat: ICD-10 topic category filter in community partner portal participant view
description: Adds ICD-10 grouping filter (M54, M79, G89, M47, F45, Z87) to the Occupational Therapy community partner portal participant cohort view. Enables outcome analysis by condition category.
author: sasha.amin

title: feat: pacing data panel alongside message compose in community partner portal
description: Adds a collapsible panel showing last 7-day pacing data when the advisor is composing a message to a participant. Reduces context switching during professional communication.
author: amy.chen

title: feat: de-identified quarterly outcomes export for Occupational Therapy advisor review
description: Adds de-identified CSV export endpoint to the data pipeline for quarterly Occupational Therapy advisor reviews. Includes pacing adherence, pain score trends, and condition category breakdown.
author: lisa.reed

title: docs: add privacy BAA section to Occupational Therapy advisor onboarding guide
description: Adds a 1-page privacy BAA summary and acknowledgment checklist to page 3 of the advisor onboarding guide. Required before advisors access any de-identified aggregate data.
author: frank.schultz

title: feat: SSO support for bitterrootrehab.com identity provider
description: Adds bitterrootrehab.com as a supported OIDC SSO identity provider. Enables Bitterroot Rehab occupational therapists to log in with their clinic credentials.
author: connor.walsh

title: feat: exponential backoff retry logic for 5xx API responses
description: Adds tenacity-based retry with exponential backoff to all professional API person requests. Fixes transient 503 failures in advisor batch scripts.
author: sasha.amin

title: feat: FHIR Observation - pacing budget mapped to LOINC 55284-4
description: Maps daily pacing budget usage to LOINC observation code 55284-4 (Physical activity level) in the FHIR R4 service. Enables EHR import of pacing data.
author: jaylen.brooks

title: feat: user-defined baseline from typical good day
description: Adds 'typical good day' baseline configuration in the user profile. Pacing budget is calculated relative to user-defined functional capacity, not topic category only.
author: amy.chen

title: feat: pacing reminder respects user time-of-day preference
description: Notification service now reads the user's preferred reminder time from profile settings. Supports morning (8am) and evening (7pm) preference options.
author: marcus.price

title: docs: FHIR R4 Observation resource mapping guide for Occupational Therapy integrations
description: Adds developer documentation for FHIR R4 Observation mapping - pain scores, pacing data, and functional outcome resources. Includes LOINC code reference table.
author: frank.schultz

title: content: add 'Why does pain persist?' pain science education module
description: Adds three-part pain science education content module to the in-app library. Covers central sensitization, neuroplasticity, and the biopsychosocial model - professional Occupational Therapy advisor review completed.
author: diana.reyes

title: infra: upgrade EKS node group to t3.large for professional API pod capacity
description: Current t3.medium nodes are at 85% CPU during peak hours. Upgrading to t3.large to support professional API response time SLO of <200ms p95.
author: lisa.reed
